name: DermaTECH+ needle-free mesotherapy
shortDescription: The DermaTECH+ is the latest generation needle-free mesotherapy device with DermoPenetrate Max technology. Painless active ingredient delivery up to 800 kDa molecular size, without electrolysis or pH change. A year-round device.
description:
The DermaTECH+ is the latest generation needle-free mesotherapy system that uses DermoPenetrate Max technology for deep and even delivery of active ingredients – without pain, needles, or recovery time.

The device uses microcurrent impulses and precision vibration to temporarily open the skin cells' natural water channels (aquaporins), allowing active ingredients to be absorbed at the molecular level into the dermis.

A non-invasive alternative to traditional needle mesotherapy – completely painless, usable year-round.
metaTitle: DermaTECH+ Needle-Free Mesotherapy | DermoPenetrate Max | Skinlab Hungary
metaDescription: DermaTECH+ needle-free mesotherapy device. Painless active ingredient delivery up to 800 kDa. No electrolysis, no pH change. Year-round use, CE certified.

videoDescription.headline: DermaTECH+ – the future of active ingredient delivery, without needles
paragraphs: Traditional mesotherapy is effective but painful and seasonally limited. The DermaTECH+ with DermoPenetrate Max technology delivers active ingredients into the deeper layers of the skin completely needle-free and painlessly.
The device can transdermally deliver active ingredients up to 800 kDa molecular size – peptides, hyaluronic acids, DNA activators – which previously could only reach the dermis via injection.
Since there's no puncture, no bleeding, and no recovery time, the DermaTECH+ is a year-round device – usable throughout the entire year, even in summer.

features.title: DermoPenetrate Max technology – needle-free, yet deep
features.description:
DermoPenetrate Max technology uses microcurrent impulses and precision vibration to temporarily open the skin cells' natural water channels (aquaporins).

How it works:

Microcurrent opens aquaporins
Vibration aids even flow of active ingredients
Active ingredients are absorbed at the molecular level
Transports molecules up to 800 kDa in size

features.title: Why is it better than traditional mesotherapy?
features.description:
The DermaTECH+ is a non-invasive alternative to classic mesotherapy treatments, offering numerous advantages over needle-based treatments.
No needles, pain, or micro-injuries
No electrolysis or pH change
Even larger-molecule ingredients penetrate (800 kDa)
Even active ingredient distribution (not point-based)
No recovery time – instant comfort
Year-round – can be used even in summer
completely painlessnon-invasiveusable year-round

features.title: Intelligent skin resistance detection
features.description:
The DermaTECH+'s intelligent sensor system continuously monitors skin condition and resistance, adjusting impulse intensity to the skin's current needs at every moment.
Real-time skin resistance measurement
Automatic impulse intensity adjustment
Maximum safety on all skin types
Every drop of active ingredient is optimally absorbed

features.title: No electrolysis, no pH change
features.description:
DermoPenetrate Max technology completely eliminates the risk of electrolysis and pH change, which is unavoidable with most electrical active ingredient delivery methods.
The serum retains its potency and stability
The skin receives pure, active ingredient form
Faster, safer cellular-level renewal
100% active ingredient utilization in the skin

features.title: Recommended treatments
features.description:
The DermaTECH+ is a versatile device suitable for treating a wide variety of skin concerns.
Hydrating and revitalizing mesotherapy
Skin rejuvenation, firming, lifting
Wrinkle prevention and tone improvement
Pigmentation fading and skin brightening
Post-acne regeneration
Serum-based ingredient delivery for any skin type

features.title: Who is the DermaTECH+ recommended for?
features.description:
Estheticians looking for needle-free mesotherapy
Salons seeking a year-round ingredient delivery solution
For anti-aging and skin renewal protocols
Professionals treating sensitive skin
As a complementary device for medical aesthetic centers

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: We provide professional operator training for the DermaTECH+ device within the framework of officially registered adult education. The goal of the training is for participants to fully understand the DermoPenetrate Max technology and optimal treatment protocols.
items: Operating principles of DermoPenetrate Max technology
Synergy of microcurrent and vibration in active ingredient delivery
Treatment protocols for various skin concerns (anti-aging, pigmentation, acne)
Active ingredient selection and serum application
Skin resistance detection system operation and settings
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the DermaTECH+ device.
If you're interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Lukács Viktória
testimonials.text: The DermaTECH+ has revolutionized active ingredient delivery treatments in my salon. <mark>Clients love that it's completely painless</mark>, yet the results are stunning. The 800 kDa penetration is truly noticeable – the skin is much more deeply hydrated and plumped.

testimonials.name: Bíró Adrienn
testimonials.text: For me, the biggest advantage is that <mark>it's a year-round device – I can use it even in summer</mark>. Due to the seasonal limitations of traditional mesotherapy, this revenue source previously dropped off in summer. With the DermaTECH+, I can offer active ingredient delivery treatments all year long.

testimonials.name: Gál Szilvia
testimonials.text: The value for money is <mark>outstanding</mark>. With an affordable device, I can provide premium services. My clients immediately feel the difference compared to regular cream application – the skin becomes radiant and plumped. The training was very useful too.

expertQuote.quote: DermaTECH+'s DermoPenetrate Max technology represents a true breakthrough in needle-free active ingredient delivery. The complete elimination of electrolysis and pH change guarantees that active ingredients reach the skin in a pure, active form – this is the non-invasive alternative to clinical mesotherapy.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What is DermoPenetrate Max technology?
faq.answer: DermoPenetrate Max uses microcurrent impulses and precision vibration to temporarily open the skin cells' natural water channels (aquaporins). This allows active ingredients to reach the dermis at the molecular level, without needles – even molecules up to 800 kDa in size.

faq.question: Is the treatment painful?
faq.answer: No, the DermaTECH+ treatment is completely painless. There's no puncture, no micro-injury, no burning or stinging sensation. The client receives a pleasant, relaxing experience and can continue their day immediately after treatment.

faq.question: Why is it better than traditional needle mesotherapy?
faq.answer: The DermaTECH+ causes no pain, micro-injury, or bleeding. It doesn't change the pH of the active ingredient and doesn't cause electrolysis. It can deliver larger-molecule active ingredients (800 kDa vs. the limitations of traditional mesotherapy). It provides even active ingredient distribution and requires no recovery time.

faq.question: What active ingredients can it be used with?
faq.answer: Almost any cosmetic serum and ampoule: hyaluronic acid, peptides, vitamin C, retinol, niacinamide, growth factors, DNA activators, brightening and regenerating ingredients. The 800 kDa penetration capability enables the use of large-molecule compounds as well.

faq.question: Why is it a year-round device?
faq.answer: Since the DermaTECH+ doesn't cause skin damage (no puncture, no peeling), the skin doesn't become photosensitive after treatment. Therefore, it can be safely used in summer, even in strong sunlight – unlike traditional needle mesotherapy, which is seasonally limited.

faq.question: How quickly does the DermaTECH+ pay for itself?
faq.answer: Needle-free mesotherapy treatment prices typically range from 10,000–25,000 Ft. With 3–5 clients per day, the device generally pays for itself within 1–2 months. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: A one-day operator training within an official adult education framework, which is free with device purchase. The training covers DermoPenetrate Max technology operation, treatment protocols, and active ingredient selection. We issue a certificate.
